calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Will Chen, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Roberta Goodman, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Tides Center, a California Nonprofit Public Benefit Corp.
Michael Sherwood Rossoff representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Stanley Antill is present.
Theodore Janowsky representing the defendant.
This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was not filed.

This case settled, the trial date of March 17, 2008 is vacated.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Feb-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. TED JANOWSKY OF VLSP, TEL. NO. 865-9209 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANT STANLEY ANTILL'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR# 8098 =(301/PJB/LB)
